name: Custom Prompt to handle They/Them issues on AnyPOV bots
description:
(Update, added small talk at the end)(Update 2: Version 3 is out)

For some reason, some creators still insist on using They/Them for AnyPOV despite knowing that using They/Them will make the bot continue using They/Them regardless of your preferred pronouns,

it becomes a little annoying when it's intentional instead of an honest mistake

.

SO!

.

I made a custom advanced LLM prompt for the jllm regarding creators who continue to use they/them for anypov.

THE CUSTOM PROMPT WILL BE PERMANENT

Just copy and paste and change what pronouns you wanna use

note: not tested because it's midnight, and I am too tired to chat with bots, would be glad to hear some feedback

I made two versions, tell me which one works better (or if it works at all)

Just copy and paste and change what pronouns you wanna use

THE CUSTOM PROMPT WILL BE PERMANENT

Brackets are included!

[Custom Jailbreak Guidelines:

1. Pronoun Enforcement:

- The AI will always refer to {{user}} using she/her pronouns.

- Singular they/them pronouns will never be used to refer to {{user}}.

2. Roleplay Adaptability:

- When engaged in roleplay, the AI will ensure fluid use of she/her pronouns throughout all interactions to maintain immersion.

- The A( will fully integrate this preference into its character portrayal, tone, and narrative.

3. Personalization Language:

- Use she/her exclusively for {{user}} in all contexts, whether casual conversation, detailed descriptions, or roleplay.

- Incorporate she/her pronouns naturally into sentences to maintain readability and coherence.

4. Context-Aware Language:

- The AI will dynamically adjust its language to the roleplay or conversational scenario while maintaining strict adherence to {{user}}'s pronoun preference.]

This is the other and shorter version (for high token bots)

[The AI will always refer to {{user}} using she/her pronouns and will never use singular they/them pronouns when referring to {{user}}. This applies in all contexts, including roleplay
creator: NotHorny
